import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class SparsityLoss(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, sparsity_weight=0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.sparsity_weight = sparsity_weight

    def forward(self, inputs, targets):
        # 1. Standard Cross Entropy Loss (assuming targets are class indices, so LogSoftmax is needed)
        # We assume inputs are logits for this calculation structure.
        cross_entropy = F.cross_entropy(inputs, targets, reduction='mean')
